channel.title: Sql-Injection on Logan Dawson
channel.description: Recent content in Sql-Injection on Logan Dawson

item.title: Gavel — HackTheBox Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Gavel walkthrough: exploit an exposed .git directory, PDO emulated prepared statement SQLi, and a PHP sandbox self-destruct to root a medium Linux box.

item.title: Appointment — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Appointment walkthrough: exploit a PHP login form with SQL injection authentication bypass on this Very Easy Linux box. Perfect intro to SQLi.

item.title: Vaccine — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Vaccine walkthrough: anonymous FTP, zip cracking, PostgreSQL SQL injection with sqlmap --os-shell, and vi GTFOBins privilege escalation on this Very Easy Linux box.
